name: PerfectScale
description: Automated Kubernetes optimization platform providing autonomous right-sizing to reduce cloud costs while maintaining availability.

seo.title: PerfectScale — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: PerfectScale: Automated Kubernetes optimization platform providing autonomous right-sizing to reduce cloud costs while maintaining availability.

when_to_use: Kubernetes resource right-sizing for SOC 2 availability SLA
Autonomous pod scaling to reduce over-provisioning waste
Cost and compliance optimization across EKS and GKE clusters
OPA policy enforcement for K8s security posture compliance
Cloud cost governance reporting for FinOps and security teams

pros: Claims cost savings without SRE tuning work
Reliability guardrails aim to prevent evictions
Works across EKS, GKE, and AKS
cons: Category placement as compliance-automation is a stretch
Automated changes require trust in the optimizer
Savings depend heavily on current waste levels
Competes against free VPA and well-known FinOps tools
review.verdict: A legitimate k8s cost tool — just know this is FinOps, not a compliance automation play as marketed here.
review.best_for: Ops teams with large Kubernetes footprints chasing cloud savings
review.not_for: Anyone expecting a SOC 2 or HIPAA compliance platform
